title: AppLovin Backs Velocity As The AI Industry Looks Beyond Subscriptions For Growth
summary: Velocity is building around that gap, and the company has gained a new investor with deep roots in advertising technology. Velocity’s strategy is based on adding another option to that equation: monetization through advertising and recommendations designed around real-time user intent.
